name: Blue Cheese Dressing (Prodigy)
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 oz Blue cheese or Roquefort, crumbled
2 tbsp Red wine or Balsamic vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Mix until well combined and creamy.
3. Refrigerate until ready to use.
4. Serve over crisp mixed greens.
